title: Job Opening Software Engineer at Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd
company: Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Software Engineer at Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
We at Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Software Engineer based out of Bhopal. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd!
